calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-22-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay, Clerk Nicole Olcomendy, Reporter Leticia Perez.

Case settled according to the following terms. Defendant is to vacate premises on or before Apr-30-2002. If the defendant vacates the premises, plaintiff will waived back rent, this does include any overpayment compensation from HUD on behalf of defendant. If the defendant complies with the terms of this settlement, the matter will be dismissed with prejudice. If the defendant defaults on these terms, the plaintiff will seek judgment by ex parte application for restitution of the premises and the amount prayed for in the complaint.

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-17-2002 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
